evidence_repair_top_actions.command: make cited-work-backfill && make reference-relink-apply && make graph-features

gate_blockers.policy: All topic, branch, bottleneck, and future conclusions must carry evidence_grade and uncertainty reasons until this gate passes.

Topic value must be tested across multiple optics themes, not tuned only for Metalens. Benchmark topics are regression fixtures, not product allowlists or LLM cost-control gates; the active regression and product-baseline entrypoints must default to the full benchmark suite, and topic-gap repair is blocked until queued papers have decision-grade current-contract section evidence. When blocked, a topic-gap section triage report must identify whether the next repair is current-contract reparse, parser/full-text inspection, access recovery, or targeted ingest. Current-parser no-target papers require a no-target PDF inspection before parser thresholds can be loosened.

live_blockers.next_action: Continue processing the remaining cited-work queue in small exact-ID batches; rerun exact relink and graph features after each applied batch.
live_blockers.why: linked refs are 14.1%; branch/main-path claims need uncertainty labels. Reference relink audit: 0 exact-linkable, 2,763,687 no-local-match.

live_blockers.next_action: Finish top12000 section ingest, then run delta section queue for main/future/branch/keystone papers.
live_blockers.why: primary section evidence covers only 3,030 papers.

live_blockers.next_action: Use explicit/embedded heading evidence for bottleneck and Claim Card promotion; keep loose/legacy section matches as weak evidence until manually audited or re-parsed.
live_blockers.why: primary section evidence quality is still fragile: 1,438 papers have strong/moderate parser provenance; weak-only rate is 52.5%.

live_blockers.next_action: Re-run section evidence with the current parser contract before promoting section-derived bottleneck, Topic Dossier, or Claim Card claims.
live_blockers.why: primary section evidence has current parser-contract coverage for only 722/3,030 papers (23.8%); legacy parser-contract sections may predate TOC/fragment guards.

live_blockers.next_action: Do not loosen the current parser for the no-target bucket; keep those papers as weak full-text or metadata evidence and focus repair effort on stale-contract reparse and unattempted PDFs.
live_blockers.why: multi-topic regression still has decision-grade section evidence for only 45/78 queued benchmark-topic papers (57.7%); raw primary-section coverage is 48/78 (61.5%). Triage: current-parser no-target=17, stale-contract=2, unattempted-PDF=8. Typed-chain triage: atoms-missing=0, chains-missing=1, full-chain-missing=1, topic-mismatch=0. Missing stages: constraint:1, attempted_path:1, local_fix:1. Repair-contract closure: closed=17/215 (7.9%). No-target inspection: parser-target-signal=0, subthreshold-target-signal=1, sectionless/non-target-heading=10.

live_blockers.next_action: Keep conservative OpenAlex backfill; use local field/topic fallback while labeling uncertainty.
live_blockers.why: OpenAlex W coverage is 64.4%; cross-field claims need uncertainty.
